items.title: Arteta on City 2-1 Arsenal: 'The PL starts again'
items.summary: Mikel Arteta has suggested "the Premier League starts again" after Arsenal were beaten at Manchester City on Sunday but insisted the Gunners still believe they can win the title.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Dexter Lawrence: I know Bengals gave up a lot for me, and I don't take that for granted
items.summary: The Bengals traded the 10th overall pick and signed the defensive tackle to a one-year extension.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: James Bracey ton leads Gloucestershire fightback as Lancashire's injury woes deepen
items.summary: Having already lost seamer Ajeet Singh Dale to a hamstring injury on day one, visitors make second substitution when Luke Wells injures his shoulder
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
